page.title: Feature Similarity
page.subtitle: Features are connected by semantic similarity — thicker edges mean stronger relationship. Use this to discover related features and potential duplicates.

empty.title: Not enough features to compute similarity
empty.subtitle: Add at least 2 features to the catalog to see similarity relationships.

matrix.feature_picker_hint: Pick up to {{cap}} features to compare. The matrix re-renders as you toggle.
matrix.cap_warning: Showing the first {{showing}} of {{total}} selected features (cap reached)

too_few.title: Pick at least 2 features
too_few.subtitle: The matrix needs two or more features to compute pairwise scores.
